      Why choose us?

      Expert Service Options

      Schedule Service

      Why We are World Class

      Welcome to Volkswagen of Nanuet!

      Looking for an exceptional dealership experience? We welcome you to our Volkswagen dealer in Nanuet! We're proud to be a local VW dealership committed to customer satisfaction and premium driving experiences. Our diverse inventory features innovative new Volkswagen SUVs as well as dependable pre-owned models, all available at highly competitive prices.

      In addition to our new and used vehicle sales, our dealership presents various flexible Volkswagen financing options and a suite of professional auto services. We take pride in our dedicated service center that ensures your vehicle runs smoothly for years to come while using only genuine VW parts.

      We Keep You Going

      Certified Volkswagen Service & Maintenance in New York

      Maintain your driving pleasure through our comprehensive Volkswagen service center in NY. Our qualified technicians handle all maintenance aspects, from routine oil changes to complex engine repairs, using only OEM VW parts, assuring top-tier performance for your vehicle.

      When it's time for maintenance or if unexpected issues arise, schedule a VW service appointment online or simply drop by our cutting-edge facility and let our experts take it from there.

      Buy Online or In Store

      New & Used VW Vehicles in Nanuet, NY

      Your journey toward owning a unique new Volkswagen SUVin Nanuet starts here! Navigate through our extensive selectionof popular VW sedans as well as our meticulously inspected used Volkswagenvehicles. Whether you're captivated by the stylish VW Jetta, the versatileTiguan or the family-friendly Atlas, our selection has somethingtailored for every driver. For our environmentally conscious patrons, westock impressive hybrid models that blend efficiency with capability.

      Seeking exclusive offers? Glance through ourrotating new VW specialsand incentives for a great

      Read More

      New & Used VW Vehicles in Nanuet, NY

      Your journey toward owning a unique new Volkswagen SUV in Nanuet starts here! Navigate through our extensive selection of popular VW sedans as well as our meticulously inspected used Volkswagen vehicles. Whether you're captivated by the stylish VW Jetta, the versatile Tiguan or the family-friendly Atlas, our selection has something tailored for every driver. For our environmentally conscious patrons, we stock impressive hybrid models that blend efficiency with capability.

      Seeking exclusive offers? Glance through our rotating new VW specials and incentives for a great value on your dream car. Our experienced sales team is always ready to guide you toward finding the ideal VW model nearby that seamlessly blends with your lifestyle and budget aspirations, ensuring you've secured an auto financing plan that you're happy with.

      Local Volkswagen Dealer in Nanuet, NY

      Looking to make the trip from Hoboken or Spring Valley? We're conveniently located at 6 Hutton Ave in Nanuet -- a comfortable access point for local and out-of-state car enthusiasts to discover their dream Volkswagen. Swing by today and let our helpful auto sales team assist you in steering toward the perfect Volkswagen SUV for your lifestyle and needs!
